ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "location" TEXT /* Description of the incident location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the incident location */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward where the incident occurred */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community associated with the incident */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ward */,
  "area" REAL /* Geographical area covered by the ward */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the community */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the community */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type of incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or visual representation of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, city official) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ward to which the neighborhood belongs */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Geographical boundary of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_ward_id FOREIGN KEY ("ward_id") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being followed up on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the follow-up */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date the follow-up was made */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or actions taken regarding the incident */,
  "follow_up_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_follow_ups_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_follow_ups_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
